provenance.notes: Project links are navigation records, not canonical fact sources. Registered sourceRefs support classifications where available; extracted or third-party links remain explicitly unverified.

trustVocabulary.official: Registered first-party project or service entrypoint supported by an official sourceRef; this does not make every linked page canonical data.
trustVocabulary.official-context: First-party or official-domain context useful for navigation, but not independently sufficient for exact facts.
trustVocabulary.community-maintained: Community-operated or community-maintained project/resource with ownership treated as community scope.
trustVocabulary.community-curated: Community tool or collection curated by its maintainers; not a canonical MoonCat source unless separately registered.
trustVocabulary.historical: Historical project, maintainer, or source context; current ownership or maintenance is not implied.
trustVocabulary.preserved-research-link: Retained for research or navigation from an extracted link set; ownership and claims are unverified.
trustVocabulary.ownership-unverified: A useful link whose current owner, maintainer, or endorsement is not established by the registered evidence.

ownershipVocabulary.current-project-context: Registered as a current project or first-party context source.
ownershipVocabulary.community-context: Community-maintained or community-curated context; no official endorsement implied.
ownershipVocabulary.historical-context: Historical maintainer/project context; current ownership is not asserted.
ownershipVocabulary.third-party-service: Third-party marketplace or hosted service; collection/project ownership is not inferred.
ownershipVocabulary.ownership-unverified: The link is preserved, but the owner or maintainer was not established in this pass.

todos: Recheck ownership or maintenance only for high-value links when a dedicated verification pass is justified; do not infer status from branding or URL shape.
Keep project links separate from canonical data values.
